title: draba malpighiacea
intro: Draba malpighiacea, also known as Malpighia draba, is a species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. It is a small, annual or biennial plant with edible leaves and flowers that have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties. The plant has been found to have anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health issues such as wounds, fever, and respiratory problems. The leaves and flowers of the plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion for its medicinal benefits, making it a valuable resource in herbal medicine.
